queries.question: What roles do all retail stores have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Staff_Roles.role_title  from Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles join Staff_Roles on Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles.staff_role_id = Staff_Roles.role_id join Retail_Stores on Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles.retail_store_id = Retail_Stores.store_id   GROUP BY Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles.staff_role_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles.retail_store_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Retail_Stores)

queries.question: For each retail store, list the roles they have.
queries.sql: select retail_stores.store_name , staff_roles.role_title from Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles join Staff_Roles on Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles.staff_role_id = Staff_Roles.role_id join Retail_Stores on Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles.retail_store_id = Retail_Stores.store_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?store_name ?role_title WHERE {
  ?retail_stores_staff_roles a :Retail_Stores_Staff_Roles .
  ?staff_roles a :Staff_Roles .
  ?retail_stores_staff_roles p:hasStaff_Roles ?staff_roles .
  ?retail_stores a :Retail_Stores .
  ?retail_stores_staff_roles p:hasRetail_Stores ?retail_stores .
  ?retail_stores p:store_name ?store_name .
  ?staff_roles p:role_title ?role_title .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the roles every retail store has.
